content: Select the agent where you want to chat with AI about the selected file. You can pick an existing agent.

comment.text: This text appears in an info bar within the UI, prompting the user to choose an AI agent to interact with a selected file. It explains that users can select an existing agent for conversation. The purpose is to guide the user in selecting the appropriate agent for AI-powered file interaction.

ai_spell_check_issues.description: The Spanish translation adds information ('o crear uno nuevo') that is not present in the English source text.
ai_spell_check_issues.suggestion: Seleccione el agente con el que desea chatear con la IA sobre el archivo seleccionado. Puede elegir un agente existente.

ai_spell_check_issues.description: The Armenian translation adds information not present in the English source ('կամ ստեղծել նորը' / 'or create a new one'). While helpful, it deviates from the source text provided.
ai_spell_check_issues.suggestion: Ընտրեք այն գործակալին, որի հետ ցանկանում եք զրուցել ԱԲ-ի հետ ընտրված ֆայլի վերաբերյալ: Կարող եք ընտրել առկա գործակալը:

ai_spell_check_issues.description: The Japanese translation adds information not present in the English source ('or create a new agent'), which may lead to UI inconsistency if the 'create' functionality is not actually available in this specific context.
ai_spell_check_issues.suggestion: 選択したファイルについてAIとチャットしたいエージェントを選択してください。既存のエージェントを選択できます。

ai_spell_check_issues.description: The Italian translation adds information ('o crearne uno nuovo' / 'or create a new one') that is not present in the source English text.
ai_spell_check_issues.suggestion: Seleziona l'agente con cui desideri chattare con l'AI riguardo al file selezionato. Puoi scegliere un agente esistente.

ai_spell_check_issues.description: Grammatical error in gender agreement: 'izbranem datoteko' is incorrect. 'Datoteka' is a feminine noun, so it should be 'izbrano datoteko'.
ai_spell_check_issues.suggestion: Izberite agenta, kjer želite klepetati z umetno inteligenco o izbrani datoteki. Lahko izberete obstoječega agenta.
